    Method
    Description
    static AbstractSwaggerConfigurer.SwaggerResourceHandlerConfig
    AbstractSwaggerConfigurer.SwaggerResourceHandlerConfig.createCached()
    Create a Swagger resource handler config with resource caching enabled.
    static AbstractSwaggerConfigurer.SwaggerResourceHandlerConfig
    AbstractSwaggerConfigurer.SwaggerResourceHandlerConfig.createUncached()
    Create a Swagger resource handler config with resource caching disabled.
    protected AbstractSwaggerConfigurer.SwaggerResourceHandlerConfig[]

    Gets the handler configs for mapping Swagger UI resources.

    Gets the handler configs for mapping webjar resources for the Swagger UI.
